summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tenant Enrollment Wizard, Market tier updates, and NeoSC rebranding. Backend: 13/13 tests pass (100%). All enrollment endpoints create REAL NetBird resources (groups, setup-keys, policies). Frontend: Enroll Tenant page shows 3 tiers (Starter $29, Plus $79, Enterprise Custom) with org form fields. Market page shows updated prices. Landing page shows NeoGuard, NeoMesh, NeoDesk branding. Sidebar shows admin links for admin users.

minor.issue: Returns 'manual_pending' status - Zitadel service user needs IAM_OWNER permission
minor.note: This is expected behavior per agent_to_agent_context_note - Zitadel org creation requires IAM permissions

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/tenants/enroll with plus tier works correctly
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/step/netbird-group creates REAL NetBird group (returns completed)
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/step/netbird-setup-key creates REAL NetBird setup key (returns completed)
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/step/netbird-policy creates REAL NetBird policy (returns completed)
POST /api/admin/tenants/{id}/step/finalize activates tenant with correct MRR ($29 for starter)
Non-admin user gets 403 on all enrollment endpoints (enroll, netbird-group, finalize, enrollment-status)
Frontend /admin/enroll-tenant shows 3 tiers: Starter $29, Plus $79, Enterprise Custom
Frontend /admin/enroll-tenant has org form with org_name, email_admin, RFC, Razón Social fields
Frontend /market shows plans: Starter $29, Plus $79, Enterprise Custom
Landing page shows NeoGuard SSO, NeoMesh VPN, NeoDesk RDP branding
Sidebar shows 'Enrolar Tenant', 'NeoGuard SSO', 'NeoMesh' links for admin users
critical_code_review_comments: NetBird API integrations are REAL (not mocked) - creates actual groups, setup-keys, and policies
Zitadel org creation returns 'manual_pending' due to IAM permission requirements - this is expected
All enrollment endpoints properly check for admin role using require_admin() helper
MRR calculation is correct: Starter $29 (2900 cents / 100), Plus $79 (7900 cents / 100)
Frontend tier buttons have correct data-testid attributes (tier-starter, tier-plus, tier-enterprise)
Form fields have correct data-testid attributes (enroll-org-name, enroll-email)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all enrollment wizard, market, and branding features working)

seed_data_creation: Test tenants created with prefix 'TEST_' during enrollment tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant Enrollment Wizard fully tested. NetBird API creates REAL resources (groups, setup-keys, policies). Zitadel org creation returns 'manual_pending' due to IAM permissions - this is expected. Market tiers updated: Starter $29, Plus $79, Enterprise Custom. Rebranding complete: NeoGuard, NeoMesh, NeoDesk, NeoProxy, NeoVault. All admin endpoints enforce role='admin' with 403 for non-admin users. Frontend data-testid attributes: tier-starter, tier-plus, tier-enterprise, enroll-org-name, enroll-email, start-enrollment, run-step-{key}.

real_api_data.netbird_setup_keys_created: REAL - creates actual NetBird setup keys

mocked_apis.zitadel_org_creation: Returns manual_pending due to IAM permission requirements
